transcript.title: Opening
transcript.text: Good morning Rushil Bhatia. Here is your daily news for Wednesday, July 8. In today's briefing: top headlines, bhopal and madhya pradesh, business and markets, money, tax and personal finance, science and technology, development and policy, across india, around the world. Let's begin.

transcript.title: Top headlines
transcript.text: First, the stories leading the news this morning. 'Iran violated truce': US launches 'powerful strikes' after attacks on tankers in Hormuz. United States forces launched strikes against Iranian targets early Wednesday. These actions followed attacks on three merchant ships in waters off Oman. Iran stated it would take necessary measures to safeguard its national security. The United States had also revoked a license authorizing Iranian oil sales. After govt notice, Meta details child safety steps. Meta revealed new child safety measures after an Indian government notice regarding Instagram ads. The company disabled numerous offending accounts and advertisements using advanced artificial intelligence tools. Meta stated its systems detect suspicious off-platform links and other exploitation signals. Globally, over four million accounts were removed last year for suspicious child-related activity. 'It got rupees 160 crore from TMC': ED searches Kolkata company over aircraft deal. Enforcement Directorate searched five locations in Kolkata Tuesday. The agency is probing an aviation firm's alleged financial dealings. Carewell Aviation reportedly received rupees 160 crore from TMC funds. This money was allegedly used to purchase an aircraft and a helicopter. From 0-2 to 3-2: Messi's Argentina pull off impossible, storm into quarterfinals. Argentina staged one of the greatest comebacks of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, scoring three goals in the final 11 minutes to beat Egypt 3-2 and reach the quarter-finals. After falling 2-0 behind and seeing Lionel Messi miss a penalty, late strikes from Cristian Romero, Messi and Enzo Fernández completed a remarkable turnaround to keep the champions' title defence alive. 2 pals built $13 mn AI startup by 21; say: Goal was not to build a million-dollar company. Two childhood friends launched an AI study app, generating over thirteen million dollars. Their initial goal was to create a useful product and fund college education. The Turbo AI app quickly gained traction after a viral TikTok video. They decided to leave college after their sophomore year to focus full-time. 'Tehran's actions unacceptable': US revokes license for Iranian oil sale after tanker attacks. The United States revoked an Iran oil sanctions waiver after recent tanker attacks. Three tankers were struck by projectiles in the Strait of Hormuz. One vessel caught fire off the coast of Oman following the incident. The Iranian foreign ministry condemned the US move as a breach of commitment. Landslides disrupt Maharashtra traffic, Mumbai-Pune rail services remain off track. 2 More Deaths Take Toll To 15; Landslides Affect Road Commute Virginia county manager: Electricity rates to rise sharply from July 1. As the tech landscape evolves with AI data centers, electricity costs are soaring. Henrico County, Virginia, has announced a staggering 25 percent hike in electricity bills for government facilities, prompting local officials to urge power conservation among their employees. Residents are also feeling the pinch, with some facing bill doubles. This phenomenon underscores the mounting pressure on community resources amid the rapid expansion of data centers. World's largest asset management firm CEO is worried about how Mamdani is running NY. BlackRock CEO Larry Fink voiced concerns about New York City's business climate. He noted that 47 percent of city tax revenue comes from the top 1 percent of taxpayers. Fink stated that inadequate services do not justify the current tax burden for residents. He believes economic growth should be prioritized over tax policy by policymakers. 4 officials from environment minister Bhupender Yadav's office removed. Four officials from Environment Minister Bhupender Yadav's office were removed on July 3. Amar Singh, a private secretary, was removed on administrative grounds. Political appointees Siddharth Yadav and Ayush Saran had their appointments terminated. Shailesh Kumar Singh was prematurely repatriated to his parent cadre. Lionel Messi, FIFA face bias claims after Argentina's win over Egypt. Argentina's 3-2 victory over Egypt generated debate far beyond the final score. Lionel Messi's missed penalty, controversial decisions and Gianni Infantino's reaction from the stands became major talking points online. While some fans claimed Argentina received favorable treatment, no evidence supports those allegations. On the pitch, the defending champions recovered from adversity and earned another place in the World Cup quarter-finals. 9 Indian ships with over 190 seafarers still near Hormuz. NEW DELHI: As on Tuesday, 50 Indian-flagged and foreign-flagged ships, with cargo bound for India, have transited the Strait of Hormuz since the start of the West Asia conflict on Feb 28.

transcript.title: Bhopal and Madhya Pradesh
transcript.text: Now, news closer to home in Bhopal and across Madhya Pradesh. Madhya Pradesh, Rajasthan, Maharashtra and Gujarat Sign Sardar Sarovar Pact. Praising the consensus reached by the states, Shah said the Sardar Sarovar project had immensely benefited Madhya Pradesh, Gujarat and Rajasthan by ensuring the supply of water and electricity to people across these states. Action Against 32 Medical Stores; Licences Of Three Suspended, Eight Registrations Cancelled. Bhopal Chief Medical and Health Officer (CMHO) and deputy director, Food and Drug Administration, Dr Manish Sharma said that under the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 and the Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945, Schedule H drugs can be sold only against the prescription of a registered medical practitioner. Will Quit Politics To Protect Religion: Diggi. Later, at a meeting of the Political Affairs Committee, the party leaders opened a front against him. Bagri To Get Clean Chit, No Proof To Prove She Is Rajput. The names of the people of the Bagri community, belonging to the Rajput category, were removed from the SC category in 2007, but there is no such proof in Satna. Flood-like situation in parts of Jbp div. Delivery Boy Dodges Leopard Attack In Bicholi Mardana. A rescue team led by range officer Yogesh Yadav and Indore range deputy ranger Komal Paliwar arrived at the scene by 22:00. Afzal Pathan, the modernist painter from Madhya Pradesh whom India forgot. Special Report: Medical Carelessness Blinds Infant! AIIMS Bhopal Confirms Lifelong Loss. Latest Hockey News and Updates. 3 Generations Nurture One Dream: Bhopal Family Produces Eight National Footballers, MP's First Female NIS Coach. Madhya Pradesh HC Refuses To Stay Departmental Inquiry Against Judicial Officer Accused Of Fabricating. 5 Killed After Speeding SUV Rams Truck In Madhya Pradesh's Maihar. Hindu Marriage Can't Be Solemnised Or Dissolved Through Notarised Agreements: Madhya Pradesh High Court. Hindu Marriage Cannot Be Performed Through A Notarised Agreement: Madhya Pradesh High Court. Madhya Pradesh Floats 625 MW/1,250 MWh BESS Tender Under BOO Model. MP 3rd highest in ragging across country, Bhopal's RGPV among top 10 most-complained about campuses. High Court Denies Relief To Civil Judge Accused In Santosh Verma Case. Rejecting the plea on the ground of delay, the Bench observed that allegations affecting the integrity of the judiciary require detailed vigilance scrutiny and that the petitioner had failed to demonstrate any specific prejudice caused by the time taken to initiate the departmental proceedings. Hindu Members Posted In Waqf Board, Madhya Pradesh Move Triggers Debate. 'Mastermind of ATM shutter tampering fraud in Bhopal is a computer engg student'. State lags in nat'l school infra targets: Report.

transcript.title: Business and markets
transcript.text: Moving to business, the economy and the markets. Kusumgar raises rupees 194 crore from anchor investors ahead of IPO opening tomorrow. Kusumgar Limited has raised rupees 193.9 crore from anchor investors for its IPO, allocating 4,628,877 shares at rupees 419 each. The IPO opens on July 8, 2026, and is an Offer for Sale of 1.55 crore shares, totaling rupees 650 crore. Gold, silver prices today: Comex gold and silver edge lower amid Middle East tensions, firm US dollar. Precious metals declined on 7 July amid rising tensions in the Middle East and ahead of Federal Reserve meeting minutes. Gold and silver futures fell sharply, continuously influenced by international geopolitical concerns and fluctuations in the US dollar and crude oil prices. Bust or boom ahead? Here's why Warren Buffett successor's $10 billion bet on big tech has divided experts. Warren Buffett's successor and Berkshire Hathaway CEO, Greg Abel faces scepticism about his investment strategy using the company's massive $400 billion cash pile, amid AI concerns and recent purchase of Alphabet stock. Rivian shares tumble 15 percent after EV maker announces 75 million share offering to repay loan. Shares of Rivian Automotive slumped 15 percent after announcing a sale of 75 million shares to repay a DOE loan. Alongside the capital raise, the company announced second-quarter revenue of $1.3 billion. Wall Street: Nasdaq, S and P 500 slip as chip stocks decline, Intel sinks 8.2 percent , Micron sheds 7.3 percent. At 09:58 a.m. ET, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.03 percent , the S and P 500 fell 0.34 percent , the Nasdaq Composite lost 1.02 percent Wipro to declare Q1FY27 results, interim dividend on this date. Check details. Wipro's board will meet on July 16 to approve Q1FY27 results. The company also considers an interim dividend while its shares face selling pressure, dropping 34 percent this year so far. Penny stock under rupees 10 rallies for second straight session, jumps another 8 percent ; here's why. Golden Legend Leasing and Finance Ltd. shares rose 8.3 percent to rupees 9.46 after announcing a new wholly owned subsidiary, Gullakkart Private Limited, to enhance its digital financial services, including a potential Prepaid Payment Instrument license from RBI. Cochin Shipyard OFS: Government to exercise green-shoe option after 3.52x Day 1 subscription. The government will now sell the full 5.04 percent stake in the state-owned shipbuilder. BJP deploys Nabin, others to retain Bankipur seat. The BJP has nominated Abhishek Kumar for the Bankipur assembly by-poll. US stock market today: S and P 500, Nasdaq futures edge lower as chip stocks retreat; crude oil prices rise. US stock futures indicate a weak start as AI stocks decline following concerns over Samsung's earnings. S and P 500 futures dropped 0.2 percent , while Nasdaq fell 0.8 percent . Investor focus shifts to upcoming earnings from Delta and PepsiCo amid rising US dollar and Treasury yields. Tenreyro appointed IMF's new Economic Counsellor. Silvana Tenreyro will join the International Monetary Fund as its new chief economist. BlackRock to launch Nasdaq-100 ETF, challenging Invesco's dominance as AI rally boosts demand. The iShares Nasdaq 100 ETF, offered by the world's largest asset manager, will track the flagship U.S. index and start trading under the ticker on Thursday 15 more districts face rain deficiency. The government is monitoring 262 districts for rainfall deficiency and El Nino impacts. SpaceX joins Nasdaq 100 as Wall Street makes bullish calls. Analysts are leaning into the long-term growth prospects for SpaceX, even as questions over its profitability, execution and valuation continue to linger after a blockbuster market debut RBI's SMS order may dent banks' income. Banks have also been given the flexibility of dropping mandatory alerts for lowvalue transactions. Gold price down over 30 percent from record high. Is this correction the start of a bear market?. Markets anticipate another interest rate hike this year, though Fed projections are mixed. Gold prices have fallen over 30 percent , reflecting a shift in focus from safe-haven demand to interest rates and economic conditions. 'Smartphone PLI plan exceeds targets'. The commerce ministry questioned the smartphone PLI scheme's success for an extension. Top Gainers and Losers on 7 July: Trent, Kalyan Jewellers, Cochin Shipyard, Tejas Networks, BSE among top losers. The Indian stock market's bull run ended on July 7 as benchmark indices fell due to profit booking, particularly in auto and metal sectors, despite gains in IT stocks. The Nifty 50 settled 0.25 percent lower, while Sensex dropped 387 points, breaking their winning streak. SIAM asks for increase in import duties on tractors. The Society of Indian Automobile Manufacturers seeks higher import duties on tractors. Stock market today: Sensex, Nifty 50 snap four-day winning streak as oil prices rise. The Sensex dropped 104 points, or 0.13 percent , to end at 78,180.72, while the Nifty 50 shed 32 points, or 0.13 percent , to finish at 24,398.70. Nifty Midcap 100 and Smallcap 100 indices dropped 0.30 percent and 0.55 percent , respectively. ICAI pauses 'global networking norms'. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India's networking guidelines have been put on hold. Is Trent's moderated growth pace the new normal?. The retailer's shares tanked 12 percent after its Q1 sales growth missed high Street expectations, leaving its expensive valuation vulnerable to a cooling consumption market. India is cashing in on the China+1 dividend. India's manufacturing growth has surpassed the global average, positioning it as an emerging leader. India VIX hits 5-month low. Could market stability attract smart money?. As India VIX drops to a five-month low, market experts suggest that declining volatility signals increased confidence in stability. However, looming factors like the earnings season and geopolitical tensions could still inflict unpredictability. India's E25 fuel plan explained. Union Minister Hardeep Singh Puri dismissed reports of E20 fuel issues as misrepresentation. NSE IPO: From derivatives dominance to dividends, Jefferies flags five key positives. With its IPO filing, NSE is noted for its robust business model by Jefferies. The exchange commands 70 percent of India's revenues and focuses on equity derivatives amidst growing competition, despite regulatory risks. Positive growth prospects maintain NSE's attractiveness in the exchange market. Meta rejects child sexual abuse ad claims. Meta has rejected government claims of deliberately targeting child abuse ads.

transcript.title: Money, tax and personal finance
transcript.text: Now to your money — taxes, savings and personal finance. CBDT clarification: All approvals like Nil or lower TDS certificate and existing tax benefits will continue under Income Tax Act, 2025; Here's what it means for you. Existing tax benefits and approvals will continue under the Income Tax Act, 2025. Pending applications filed before March 31, 2026, will be processed under the new law. Lower or nil TDS certificates issued previously remain protected and valid. New applications filed after April 1, 2026, will follow the 2025 Act. ITR filings move at a slow pace as deadline nears: Expert explains why an extension beyond 31 July is unlikely this year. With the July 31 deadline approaching, only a small percentage of taxpayers have filed their returns. Cleartax CEO Archit Gupta warns against assuming an extension this year, as slower filing rates could lead to increased pressure before the due date. Income-Tax Returns: What is authorised representative? Check full list of circumstances, services, eligibility here. Income-tax returns: Today we explain the circumstances under which taxpayers can appoint authorised representative, the requirements, eligibility criteria and other important factors. ITR 2026: Senior citizens can claim rupees 50,000 deduction even without health insurance , Here's how. The income tax return filing deadline is approaching, prompting taxpayers to gather documents. Section 80D allows senior citizens without health insurance to claim up to rupees 50,000 for medical expenses, available only under the old tax regime. Joint property given on rent: Can co-owner of property evict tenants without consent of other co-owners? Know what the law says. One co-owner can evict tenants without others' formal consent. The Bombay High Court and Supreme Court have upheld this right. This principle allows a co-owner to act as an agent for others. However, objections from other co-owners can weaken the eviction case. Bought US startup shares using overseas savings? Here's how India will tax it. A returning NRI who invested overseas savings in a US startup may not face tax on the purchase itself, but discounted acquisitions and annual foreign asset disclosures can trigger tax and compliance obligations. EPF withdrawal rules explained: How many times can you withdraw PF for illness, marriage, education, home purchase and special circumstances?. Latest EPF withdrawal rules: EPFO subscribers can withdraw funds for specific needs like illness and education. Withdrawals for marriage and housing are permitted up to five times. Special circumstances allow advances twice annually under new guidelines. EPFO: Taxation rule on Voluntary Provident Fund , the rupees 2.5 lakh VPF threshold, explained. VPF allows employees to contribute more than the mandatory EPF rate for a larger retirement corpus. Contributions over rupees 2.5 lakh face taxation on excess interest. VPF matches EPF's interest rate and qualifies for tax deductions under Section 80C, with specific withdrawal conditions. For 36 years brothers fought among themselves to get late elder sister's property; Brother with sister's registered Will wins for this reason. Elder sister gave the house to a brother via registered Will but other other brothers occupied the house with an alleged unregistered Will; Andhra High Court upholds registered Will and rejects other brother's claim on unregistered Will's basis. Know what did Andhra Pradesh High Court say about the Will. rupees 17L tax refund denied after taxpayer missed ITR e-verification while caring for ill father: Here's what ITAT ruled. A Delhi taxpayer was denied a rupees 17 lakh tax refund due to the late e-verification of his ITR while caring for his ill father. ITAT ruled that denying the refund on technical grounds violates Article 265 of the Constitution, leading to a ruling in his favour. Tamil Nadu: 25 percent salary hike for TASMAC liquor outlet employees to curb overcharging , See how pay increases. The Tamil Nadu state government has today hiked the salaries of employees working at its TASMAC liquor outlet by 25 percent with aim to bring in reforms , curb corruption and overcharging at these stores. Here's all we know... Gold rate today (July 7, 2026): Check 24k, 22k, 20k and 18k gold jewellery prices from Joyalukkas, Malabar Gold and Diamonds, Tanishq and IBJA in Delhi, Mumbai, Hyderabad, other cities. Gold prices saw a decline across major Indian jewellery brands today. Tanishq, Malabar Gold and Diamonds, Kalyan Jewellers, and Joyalukkas reported lower rates. These price drops were observed in cities like Delhi, Mumbai, and Chennai. HDFC Bank revises MCLR across tenures: Check latest lending rates and what they mean for your loan EMI. HDFC Bank's revised MCLR now ranges from 8.05 percent to 8.70 percent , affecting borrowers linked to the one-year or three-year rates. While the overnight rate decreased slightly, other tenures remain unchanged. Details here. EPS pension: Check how much monthly pension you can get after 10–25 years of service under EPS 2026. The Employees' Pension Scheme 2026 has been introduced, replacing older pension plans. This new scheme maintains the existing pension calculation formula for subscribers. Pensionable salary is determined by the average of the last sixty months' earnings. Employees receive a minimum monthly pension of one thousand rupees. 8th pay commission: HRA revision, minimum monthly transport allowance, salary increase , Check top demands by AINPSEF. 8th pay commission: The All India NPS Employees Federation (AINPSEF) has demanded HRA revision, minimum monthly transport allowance, DA hike, and salary increase for central government employees and pensioners. Latest small savings scheme interest rates: PPF versus MIS versus SCSS versus SSA - which offers highest return for July-September 2026. The government has not changed interest rates of small savings schemes like Public Provident Fund (PPF), National Savings Certificate (NSC), Senior Citizen Savings Scheme (SCSS) for the July-September 2026 quarter (FY 2026-27). Borrowers take note: HDFC Bank revises lending rates for different tenures; check updated list. HDFC Bank has adjusted its MCLR rates, with changes effective July seventh, 2026. The overnight MCLR decreased by five basis points, while longer tenors saw increases. One-year and three-year MCL rupees rose by five basis points each. Top 5 business cycle mutual funds compared: AUM, returns and portfolio strategy. Business cycle funds aim to capture opportunities across different phases of the business cycle: growth, recession, slump, and recovery. ICICI Prudential Business Cycle Fund is the biggest fund with an AUM of rupees 15,798 crore and has delivered an 18.77 percent return over the last three years. 8th Pay Commission latest news: Railway inspection, Odisha meetings and other key updates explained. The 8th Pay Commission began another round of consultations with employee unions, pensioner groups and other stakeholders in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, on July 6, 2026. DA hike: Kerala mulls 2 percent increase in Dearness Allowance by August for extra salary during Onam festivities. DA hike: Kerala is considering a 2 percent increase in Dearness Allowance for state government employees to be disbursed in their August salaries, ahead of Onam festivities. An official order is awaited. EPFO claims may take longer for 2 weeks after major system upgrade; members asked to avoid repeated requests. The Employees Provident Fund Organisation has finished a major system upgrade and database consolidation. Some EPFO services are temporarily unavailable on the UMANG app due to this migration. Form 68 explained: Who should file the new exempt income statement, how it works, can it be revised , all FAQs answered. The income tax department has launched Form 68 under the Income-tax Act, 2025, for specified investment funds to file exempt income statements and claim tax benefits for eligible non-resident investors. Details here. What is the active share of a mutual fund. Active share measures how different a fund's portfolio is from its benchmark index, expressed as a percentage between 0 percent and 100 percent . Waiver of recovery of excess amount paid to central government employees: Finance Ministry to examine proposal to simplify the process. Central government employees' union requested simpler recovery waivers for excess payments. The DoE secretary assured examination of these demands with DoPT. Audits often identify past overpayments, leading to salary deductions. NC-JCM argues these are administrative errors, not employee fault. Is a rupees 35,000 monthly pension enough in Lucknow? Expert breaks down housing, healthcare, food and daily costs. Stretching a rupees 35,000 monthly pension requires careful planning, especially in smaller cities like Lucknow and other similar urban areas. A structured budget, pre-built emergency savings, healthcare planning, and low-risk investments can help retirees manage expenses. 8th Pay commission latest news: When will 8th Pay Commission visit Kolkata?. The 8th Pay Commission will hold meetings in Kolkata, West Bengal, in July, to interact with stakeholders, including employee and pensioner bodies of the central government. Digital arrest scams cost Indians rupees 4,000 crore since 2022: How fraud works and ways to stay safe. Digital arrest scams have cost Indians more than rupees 4,000 crore since 2022 as fraudsters impersonate government officials to steal money. Check how these scams work, key complaint figures, warning signs, and practical safety tips to protect your savings from the growing threat of cyber fraud.

transcript.title: Science and technology
transcript.text: Next, science and technology. ChatGPT image generation down- OpenAI says 'implementing mitigation'. ChatGPT faced a widespread outage on Tuesday, with users reporting issues generating images and accessing past chats. OpenAI confirms it's investigating. Apple now asks users before sending Apple Intelligence requests to Google Cloud. Apple's integration of Google's AI has improved features but requires sharing user data with Google Cloud. Apple finally brings back card payments for subscriptions and App Store purchases in India. Apple has resumesdcard payments for App Store purchases in India after a four-year hiatus. Initially, only Visa and Mastercard will be accepted. Apple could bring back its iPhone X playbook for the iPhone Ultra. Apple could be planning to use the iPhone X playbook with the iPhone Ultra by delaying the initial pre-sales and orders for the foldable iPhone. New AI agent can hack systems and deploy ransomware without human help. A new report reveals that AI agents can autonomously execute ransomware attacks, evidenced by the case of JADEPUFFER, which exploited a critical vulnerability to infiltrate systems. iOS 27 beta 2 leak reveals new clue about Apple's camera-equipped AirPods: Here's what we know. Apple could be teasing a new AirPods Pro with cameras with the latest beta version of iOS 27 beta. WhatsApp usernames: Will they make India's digital conversations safer or less trustworthy? Experts weigh in. As digital platforms evolve in India, the way people identify themselves online is clearly changing too. WhatsApp's move towards usernames is more than a feature update. WhatsApp username row: Zoho's Arattai to disable username feature. Zoho's Arattai will remove its username-based account feature after the regulatory challenges faced by WhatsApp. Meta spent billions on AI, but Zuckerberg says progress has been slower than expected: Report. Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg acknowledged the shortcomings of the company's recent restructuring and the slow development of AI agents. WhatsApp issues username FAQs amid govt scrutiny, Can someone find you with it? Could you be impersonated? Check details. Meta Platforms' messaging app WhatsApp has released detailed set of frequently asked questions (FAQs) for users on its new username feature following controversy over safety and security of the rollout. Oppo Reno 16, Reno 16c launched in India: Check price, specs and more. Oppo launched the Reno 16 series featuring Snapdragon processors and AMOLED displays. Prices in India start at rupees 46,999 for the Reno 16c and rupees 61,999 for the Reno 16 Meta plans to rent AI computing power as it takes on AWS, Google Cloud: Report. Meta is developing a cloud infrastructure to sell AI computing access, competing with AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. WhatsApp usernames could open the platform to impersonations and scams, warn cybersecurity experts: Here is how. Meta's WhatsApp is launching usernames for privacy, enabling users to interact without disclosing phone numbers. While this can protect user identity, experts warn of risks like impersonation and scams, highlighting the necessity for robust anti-abuse measures to ensure safety amid these changes. Key details about iPhone 18 Pro leak online after hackers gain access to 630 GB data from Tata Electronics. Leaks from Tata Electronics reveal details about Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro, including component suppliers and internal documents after a ransomware attack. This breach, involving over 200,000 files, threatens Apple's supplier relationships and business strategy ahead of the September launch. Samsung Galaxy A27 5G debuts in India with 120Hz AMOLED display, price starts at rupees 28,999. Samsung Galaxy A27 5G features a 6.7-inch Full HD+ Super AMOLED display, Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 chipset, 50MP triple rear camera, and 5,000mAh battery. OnePlus N6 5G launched in India with 8,000mAh battery, Dimensity 6360 Apex processor: Check price and specs. The OnePlus N6 features a 6.75-inch HD display, MediaTek Dimensity 6360 Apex processor, 8,000mAh battery, and military-grade durability. WhatsApp to let users reserve usernames from next week: Here's how it works. WhatsApp introduces a username system to eliminate the need to share your phone number. The company will allow users to select their usernames starting next week. WhatsApp to let users chat without sharing phone numbers: Username feature coming soon. WhatsApp, which says it has more than 3 billion users globally, has until now allowed users to be contacted by anyone who has their phone number. Will iPhone 17 Pro Max cost nearly rupees 2 lakh in India? Leak suggests so. The iPhone 17 Pro, currently priced at rupees 1,34,900, could reportedly retail between rupees 1,54,900 and rupees 1,69,900. The iPhone 17 Pro Max may be priced between rupees 1,84,900 and rupees 1,99,900, compared with its current price of rupees 1,49,900. Samsung Galaxy M47 5G launched in India with 6,000mAh battery, 50MP OIS camera. Samsung has launched the Galaxy M47 5G in India with a price of rupees 22,999. The phone features a Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 chipset, 6.7-inch AMOLED display, 6,000mAh battery, and a 50MP camera. Apple prepares smart glasses to take on Meta, launch tipped for next year. Apple is eyeing the smart glasses market, potentially releasing its first model next year. Apple could be looking to leverage its strong ecosystem to bring in buyers, a report claims iPhone 18 Pro launch date, expected price, processor and camera upgrades. Leaks suggest Apple's iPhone 18 Pro lineup may launch on September 8 or 9. The phone is expected to see a price of around $1,200-$1,300 iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone 18 Pro Max could see up to $200 price hike, says report. Apple could raise the prices for the upcoming iPhone 18 Pro models by up to $200. The iPhone 18 Pro could be priced at $1,200-$1,300, if the new report is to be believed Mint Explainer: Why quantum computing is the next geopolitical race. With multi-billion dollar investments and new US executive orders targeting a 2028 breakthrough, global powers are rushing to secure hardware superiority before 'Q-Day' upends modern encryption. Flipkart GOAT Sale: iPhone 17 gets rupees 12,000 discount, Pro models cheaper by up to rupees 22,000. Flipkart's GOAT Sale is beginning from July 4 with discounts on various products including the iPhone 17 series. The iPhone 17 will be priced at rupees 70,900, the iPhone 17 Pro at rupees 1,12,900, and the iPhone 17 Pro Max at rupees 1,27,900 Google limits Meta's use of its Gemini AI models: Report. Google has limited Meta's access to its Gemini AI models due to high demand. This has disrupted Meta's internal AI projects and affected other Google clients. Despite growing Google Cloud revenue, computing power constraints hindered further growth in the sector.

transcript.title: Development and policy
transcript.text: Now to development, infrastructure and government policy. OECD Report: India Remains World's Fastest-Growing Major Economy. PM addresses the Indian diaspora in Jakarta. India's economy passed the Iran war test. Could El Nino spoil the party?. Silver Touch Wins RITES Order to Build India's 1st AI Infrastructure Project Appraisal Platform. Why feasibility matters for land use projects in India. IMF Raises India's Growth Forecast to 6.4 percent for 2025 and 2026, Retains Status as Fastest-Growing Major Economy. 4 states ink pact on decades-long Narmada project payment dispute. PM Modi lays foundation stone of a semiconductor manufacturing unit in Uttar Pradesh. Footwear industry is backbone of India's economy: Union Minister Giriraj Singh. Chartered Accountants play an indispensable role in strengthening India's economy: VP Radhakrishnan. India to Become $30 Trillion Economy by 2047: Piyush Goyal.

transcript.title: Across India
transcript.text: Turning to the big national stories. 'Terror threat plea improbable': HC rejects Cong worker's plea to shift trial from Srinagar to Jammu. The High Court of Jammu and Kashmir and Ladakh rejected a Congress worker's plea. He sought to shift his cheque bounce trial from Srinagar to Jammu. The court stated terrorism is almost eliminated in the Valley now. It noted the petitioner's claims of threat were improbable and lacked merit. CBI chargesheets 7 in RCFL bank fraud case. NEW DELHI: CBI filed its first chargesheet Tuesday in the rupees 4,097-crore Reliance Commercial Finance Ltd (RCFL) bank fraud case before a special CBI court in Mumbai against seven accused, including Reliance Infrastructure Ltd, Reliance Home Finance Ltd (RHFL) and five former senior RCFL executives. Before Delhi protest, NC secures Kashmir civil society's resolution for restoration of statehood. The National Conference is rallying support for its upcoming July 20 protest. Party leaders met with Kashmir civil society groups on Tuesday. These groups adopted a resolution demanding the restoration of J and K's statehood. The governing NC announced this one-day protest in Delhi earlier. Chennai tops domestic flights punctuality in May, Delhi and Mumbai at bottom of 10 busiest airports: DGCA data. Chennai airport recorded the highest on-time domestic flight performance in May. IndiGo, Akasa, and Air India Group led airline punctuality among major airports. Domestic air travel saw over 1.5 crore passengers fly within the country last month. This represents a significant increase compared to the previous month's travel figures. Bengaluru daycare horror: Police defend arrest of whistleblower, say she was 'equal party' to abuse. Bengaluru Police defended the arrest of Sujatha, the whistleblower in a daycare abuse case. Investigators claim they found enough evidence to name her as an accused party. The police commissioner stated that procedures were not followed after the incidents surfaced. Evidence suggests one alleged incident may have been stage-managed by caregivers. PM seeks UNSC reforms, inclusive development in Indonesia Parliament address. PM Narendra Modi underlined the need for urgent UNSC reforms, backed freedom of navigation in the Indo-Pacific and urged greater cooperation against terrorism, as he addressed the lawmakers in the Indonesian Parliament Complex seeking inclusive development, accessible technology and just and representative global governance. Badrinath donation row: BKTC suspends employee as probe into alleged theft begins, CCTV examined. An employee was suspended as an inquiry panel investigates donation handling irregularities. The probe began after social media allegations surfaced regarding offerings at Badrinath Dham. CCTV footage and employee statements will be examined by the four-member committee. Questions arose about CCTV camera replacements, which officials stated was routine. Defence, port, AI: Modi, Prabowo script 'golden chapter' in ties. India and ASEAN giant Indonesia signed over a dozen agreements in key areas like maritime security, critical minerals and defence, including major contracts for supply of BrahMos supersonic cruise missile system and Astra air-to-air missiles to Indonesia, while reaffirming their commitment to jointly developing the strategic Sabang port overlooking the entrance to the Strait of Malacca. The mystery of 8: Why PM Modi mentioned this number in his Indonesia speech. Prime Minister Modi emphasized the number eight during his address to the Indian diaspora in Jakarta. He noted numerical connections between India's Republic Day and President Prabowo's birthday. The number eight holds significant cultural meaning in Indonesia, symbolizing prosperity and good fortune. This visit saw twenty agreements signed, strengthening bilateral cooperation between the nations. 'Serviced vehicles not facing difficulty': Hardeep Puri rejects engine damage claims over E20 fuel. Hardeep Singh Puri dismissed social media claims about E20 petrol as misinterpretation. He stated that compatible vehicles and manufacturers report no significant issues. India has used E15 fuel for over three years and E20 since last April. Tests for E25 fuel are ongoing and will involve stakeholder consultations. School PGI climbs, but learning score stays frozen. NEW DELHI: Chandigarh has become the first State/UT in the PGI 2.0 series to enter the top (Uttam) range, scoring 766 out of 1,000 in 2025-26. PM Modi's 'Kuch Kuch Hota Hai' moment in Indonesia and a 'bahut kuch' message for future ties. NEW DELHI: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Tuesday invoked the popularity of Bollywood film 'Kuch Kuch Hota Hai' in Indonesia to describe the warmth between the two countries, saying India-Indonesia ties could go far beyond 'kuch kuch' and lead to 'bahut kuch'. PMO takes stock of El Nino impact, monitoring level and preparedness. The directions came during a high-level meeting presided by P K Mishra, Principal Secretary to the Prime Minister. Four beneficiary states sign pact on Narmada outstanding dues. The "historic agreement" was signed in the presence of Union Home Minister Amit Shah and Union Jal Shakti Minister C R Patil. '1.4 billion aspirations in motion': PM Narendra Modi sums up India's growth in Jakarta. PM Modi said: "India has carried out one reform after another. Lawrence Bishnoi gang charged in Hardeep Singh Nijjar murder: US indictment. The Canadian government in September 2025 designated the Lawrence Bishnoi gang as a terrorist entity. Woman stabbed multiple times inside Goa hospital. Stabbed woman, in her 20s, is a staffer of the government hospital and research centre in North Goa's Tuem. Mahua slams BJP over Ram Temple 'theft', says 'playing with faith of millions of Hindus'. Moitra alleged that the same Ram Mandir Trust which has been accused of allowing this alleged theft to take place under its watch is conducting the SIT inquiry, the report of which was to be submitted to Sanjay Prasad, the Principal Secretary of the Uttar Pradesh Government, who is himself a member of the same Trust.

transcript.title: Around the world
transcript.text: And finally, here is what is happening around the world. Marine Le Pen to run for French presidency and appeal conviction in top court. The hard-right National Rally leader has ended months of speculation, after a court ruled she could run but would have to wear a tag for a year. Woman suspected of Monaco bomb attack found dead in Ukraine. Police had been hunting Anastasiia Berezovska after a Ukrainian millionaire was injured in the blast. New footage shown at Kirk hearing shows man on rooftop near shooting scene. The preliminary hearing will determine whether Tyler Robinson, accused of killing conservative activist Charlie Kirk, will stand trial.

transcript.title: Sign-off
transcript.text: That is your briefing. Stay sharp, and have a strong day.
